mapper.select: SELECT alarm_feed_id AS alarmFeedId, alarm_history_id AS alarmHistoryId, instance_id AS instanceId, database_id AS databaseId, alarm_title AS alarmTitle, severity_level AS severityLevel, metric_type AS metricType, current_value AS currentValue, threshold_value AS thresholdValue, message, occurred_at AS occurredAt, resolved_at AS resolvedAt, is_resolved AS isResolved, is_read AS isRead, acknowledged, acknowledged_at AS acknowledgedAt FROM alarm_feed WHERE alarm_feed_id = #{alarmFeedId}

SELECT TO_CHAR(amh.recorded_at, 'HH24:00') AS hourLabel, AVG(CAST(amh.metric_value AS DECIMAL)) AS avgLatency FROM alarm_metric_history amh WHERE amh.alarm_history_id = #{alarmHistoryId} AND amh.recorded_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' GROUP BY TO_CHAR(amh.recorded_at, 'HH24:00') ORDER BY hourLabel

SELECT 'table' AS objectType, aro.object_name AS objectName, CONCAT('Dead ', FORMAT(aro.metric_value, 0)) AS metricValue, aro.status FROM alarm_related_objects aro WHERE aro.alarm_history_id = #{alarmHistoryId} ORDER BY aro.metric_value DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE alarm_feed SET acknowledged = TRUE, acknowledged_at = NOW() WHERE alarm_feed_id = #{alarmFeedId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM alarm_feed WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND is_read = FALSE
